query: Make the background removal actually produce a transparent background, so the 3D object is isolated on an alpha channel in the final output video.

desired.outcome: The output video has a transparent background with only the 3D object visible.
desired.quality: Background removal is applied correctly before 3D generation, and transparency is preserved through all previews and the video export.

_tags.author_rationale: This requires reordering or configuring nodes to handle alpha, a concrete yet impactful edit grounded in the workflow’s actual stages.
